title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is Endogenous and Exogenous. A few farmers in Albula Vally in Grisons revive and preserve over 30 old and partly adapted potato varieties that used to be grown in similar conditions. The innovation is related to New products. The land use systems involved are Cropland. The local assets include Natural and cultural.
